verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus, God's righteousness revealed The Son of Man, The Son of God His kingdom come Jesus, redemption's sacrifice Now glorified, now justified His kingdom come.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And His kingdom will know no end And it's glory shall know no bounds For the majesty and power of this kingdom's King has come And this kingdom's reign, And this kingdom's rule And this kingdom's power and authority Jesus, God's righteousness revealed.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Jesus, the expression of God's love The Grace of God, The Word of God Revealed to us, Jesus, God's holiness displayed. Now glorified, now justified His kingdom come.
